name: Improper Update of Reference Count
description: The product does not properly maintain reference counts for a resource, causing premature release while still in use or resource leaks when counts never reach zero. This can lead to use-after-free conditions, denial of service through resource exhaustion, or data corruption.
detection_pattern: STORAGE[resource] node has TRANSFORM[ref_increment] and TRANSFORM[ref_decrement] operations where the count logic is imbalanced, leading to TRANSFORM[release] occurring while other TRANSFORM or EGRESS nodes still reference the STORAGE node
